_comment_DIM: Request tile size; effective DIM_A=min(DIM,GEMM_SIZE_A/SPLIT_A), DIM_B=min(DIM,GEMM_SIZE_B/SPLIT_B). For cubic N with SPLIT=2: pick DIM so (N/2)%DIM_A==0, (N/2)%DIM_B==0, and N*(N/2)%(DIM_A*DIM_B)==0 (see validate_gemm_config.py --suggest-cubic). DIM_B must be divisible by SUB_TILE_B (e.g. 4).
_comment_DATA_TYPE: int16 or int32. Makefile forces WRD_LN from type (8/4). Sub-tiles: see SUB_TILE_*; int32 uses WRD_LN=4. Run: python3 design/design_configs/validate_gemm_config.py --suggest-cubic
_comment_SPLIT_A: Decomposition factor for rows of Matrix A
_comment_SPLIT_B: Decomposition factor for columns of Matrix B
_comment_CASC_LN_AB: Decomposition factor for AB dimension (columns of A, rows of B)
_comment_LEGACY: SPLIT and CASC_LN are kept for backward compatibility, but SPLIT_A, SPLIT_B, and CASC_LN_AB should be used
_comment_AIE_RUNTIME_RATIO: adf::runtime<ratio> per matrix_mult kernel (0.05–1.0). Higher often reduces Phase 6 wall time; if hang/wrong C, lower toward 0.75. Rebuild libadf after change.
_comment_WRD_LN: 8 for int16 and 4 for int32 elements per 128-bit PLIO
_comment_SUB_TILE: Matrix C (and B): SUB_TILE_A=4, SUB_TILE_AB=4, SUB_TILE_B=4 (int16 and int32). DIM_B must be divisible by SUB_TILE_B. Regenerate ioFiles after change (make create_ioFiles or plioGen.py).
_comment_GRAPH_ITER_CNT: Must equal (GEMM_SIZE_A*GEMM_SIZE_B/SPLIT_B)/(DIM_A*DIM_B) with DIM_A=min(DIM,GEMM_SIZE_A/SPLIT_A), DIM_B=min(DIM,GEMM_SIZE_B/SPLIT_B). Makefile refreshes this when building gemm_config.h; plio_utils warns if wrong.
_comment_USE_DDR_ONLY_MODE: If 1, forces DDR-only mode (bypasses PS RAM). If 0, auto-detects based on memory size (>6GB). Useful for testing DDR mode with small matrices.
_comment_SUB_TILE_DATA_TYPE: Defaults via plio_utils/Makefile: 4x4x4 for int16 and int32 when SUB_TILE_* omitted.
_comment_SIMPLE_OUT_C: 1: dma_hls simple out_C — compare c.txt to aiesim_data/.../c_golden.txt. 0: complex out_C — compare c.txt to .../matrix_C_golden.txt (full row-major C = A*B); Makefile sets parametric FIFO_C_DEPTH_COMPLEX for AXIS C FIFOs.
